title: Morning Training
story: Tsubasa wakes up early, at five o'clock, when the sky is still dark. First, exercise: he runs up the hill three times. Then he works on a new skill — stopping the ball with his chest. To improve, there is only one way: repeat it. He repeats it a hundred times, until his legs say no. Sweat runs down his face, and he needs his towel. After a short rest, he takes a deep breath and starts to count again: "Ninety-eight... ninety-nine... one hundred!" His muscles hurt, but he smiles. "Finish! Now, breakfast!"

words.def: before the usual time; near the start of the day.
words.ex: He wakes up early, at five o'clock.
words.mn: ear(耳朵)+ly→早起的鸟儿竖着耳朵。反义词 late(晚)。

words.def: to stop sleeping and open your eyes.
words.ex: Tsubasa wakes up before the sun.
words.mn: wake up 常连用。过去式 woke。闹钟的工作就是 wake you up。

words.def: moving your body to make it strong; a small piece of work to help you learn.
words.ex: Morning exercise makes his legs strong.
words.mn: 一词两义:锻炼/练习题——都是'反复操练'。do exercise=锻炼,do exercises=做习题。

words.def: something you can do well after you learn and practice it.
words.ex: Stopping the ball is a hard skill.
words.mn: 游戏里的'技能'就是 skill。skilled worker=熟练工。

words.def: to become better, or to make something better.
words.ex: His English improves a little every day.
words.mn: im(使)+prove(好,proof 证明自己)→让自己更好=提高。学习类文章高频词。

words.def: to do or say something again.
words.ex: Repeat it a hundred times, and it is yours.
words.mn: 词根:re(再)+peat→再来一遍。复读机按钮、说'请再说一遍'都是 repeat。
百分数 percent 的 cent 也是 100(一美元=100 cents)。two hundred 不加 s。

words.def: up to a time; before that time does not stop.
words.ex: He practices until it is dark.
words.mn: un+till,till 也是'直到'。记口诀:not...until=直到…才。

words.def: water that comes out of your skin when you are hot or you work hard.
words.ex: Sweat runs down his face like rain.
words.mn: ⚠️发音坑:ea 读 /e/ 不读 /iː/。sweater(毛衣)=让你出汗的衣服,一下就记住了。

words.def: a soft cloth you use to make your body dry.
words.ex: He puts the towel on his head.
words.mn: 习语 throw in the towel=认输(拳击教练把毛巾扔进拳台表示弃赛)——一条毛巾记一词一短语。浴巾=bath towel。

words.def: a time when you stop working and sit or sleep.
words.ex: Take a rest — your body needs it.
words.mn: restaurant(餐厅)开头就是 rest——歇脚吃饭的地方。the rest 另有'剩下的'之意。

words.def: the parts inside your body that move your bones and make you strong.
words.ex: His leg muscles hurt after training.
words.mn: ⚠️发音坑:c 不发音,读'马搜'。词源很萌:拉丁语'小老鼠'——肌肉鼓起来像皮下有只小鼠在跑。

words.def: the air that goes in and out of your body.
words.ex: Take a deep breath, then shoot.
words.mn: 名词 breath /breθ/,动词 breathe /briːð/ 多个 e 拖长音。深呼吸=take a deep breath。

words.def: to say numbers one by one; to find how many there are.
words.ex: He counts his kicks: one, two, three...
words.mn: 会计 accountant 就是天天 count 钱的人。count on sb=指望某人(把他算进来)。

words.def: to come to the end of something.
words.ex: He finishes training when the sun comes up.
words.mn: 赛跑终点线上写的就是 FINISH。fin 在拉丁语=结尾(电影结尾字幕 Fin)。
